textByHashes.564d51cf54c9357e75e111f36304c43480218940: It was the bad man! He hurt my mommy and daddy! He made them all freezey!
textByHashes.a9d3b67cd488780d64d40f6540b0033d949d3008: He said it was because they stole his diamond! But they never did! They found it, and didn't know who it belonged to!
textByHashes.b47e0918c45490290b5a15c2c562104604c689ff: My mommy always told me stealing is wrong, they would never steal from someone!
textByHashes.1297730c9794e22aca7ec05a1a71c7caffb0fac4: Then he did some wavey hand thing and my mommy and daddy got frozified!
textByHashes.5b08b58720d676d7865f43d83ff7a41ecb10fcac: -sniff- I don't think they really wanted it anyway, they would have given it back to the bad man if he'd asked before freezifying them...
textByHashes.722f39ff2e6fe7ab16a639ee14eb8a17d18003c2: I give you my promise mister that if you unfreeze my mommy and daddy, you can have the stupid diamond.
textByHashes.d0d41e7fd5e6ab3ce55c553894f60baf91022192: Oh, I'm sorry. My mommy says that we ice trolls are so cold we can freeze the air around us when we are upset or angry.
textByHashes.f10fe4e009c1c07e6afce7a4ae2a43eb7833608e: I'm afraid I must have frozen those gates too much when I was crying, but since you told me you are going to help rescue my mommy and daddy you should be able to squeeze through the bars.
textByHashes.60cd72834f621c5382921ca0aa889099186ed19c: You are much smaller than most trolls, it should be easy for you!
textByHashes.e0aabdf0bc29e2e528a812c2428f21db7986cbcc: Here ya go, mister! Thanks for getting my mom and dad away from the bad man!
textByHashes.08fd8edd5e3f15b53cef484c99d9ffe0b20907f0: Here ya go, lady! Thanks for getting my mom and dad away from the bad man!
textByHashes.1ee916d3adfd4c3b46d16f6aac11afb67c9257e6: Thanks for all your help! I'm surprised you managed to survive the blizzard, being a thin skinned fleshy and all!
textByHashes.d10c52961054c0092eabe38fd2ce8778981607f3: That's okay, it blew back on an icy wind... It's almost like it wants to stay here! Here, take it back, you've earned it.
textByHashes.a281b4be34c842e3b2f39167cd534d1de5232cc3: Thanks for rescuing my mum and dad!
